VOID DRIFTER

You are caught in the accretion disk of a supermassive black hole.

Use your mouse to drift against gravity. Collect Stardust (💎) to power your suit. Avoid the Void Debris (🪨) and do not fall into the Event Horizon.

SINGULARITY REACHED

You drifted for too long.
